name: @monobrain/browser
description: Browser automation for AI agents - integrates agent-browser with monobrain swarms

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{execSync('agent-browser --version',{stdio:'ignore'});}catch{console.log('\n📦 Installing agent-browser globally...');try{execSync('npm install -g agent-browser@latest',{stdio:'inherit'});console.log('✅ agent-browser installed successfully!');}catch(e){console.log('⚠️  Could not install agent-browser globally. Run manually:\n   npm install -g agent-browser@latest');}}"

author: nokhodian
